query:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN customerExternalId = '' THEN 'EMPTY_STRING' ELSE 'HAS_VALUE' END as id_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) as totalCost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) as totalRevenue
FROM services 
WHERE (monthlyRevenue > 0 OR monthlyCost > 0)
  AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived')
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
GROUP BY id_type
ORDER BY id_type;

  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) as totalCost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) as totalRevenue
FROM services 
WHERE (monthlyRevenue > 0 OR monthlyCost > 0)
  AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived')
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
